gate_matrix.description: Lean structural witnesses compile in v2 lane.
Python deterministic witness and replay tests pass in v2 lane.
Independent skeptic review with model-family diversity attached.

proved_core_blockers.description: Continuum EFT identification remains structure-first/diagnostic. Current contract still reports non-proved-core status.
exit_criteria: Replace hypothesis-level continuum mapping assumption with a discharged theorem-level identification chain.
Update skeptic verdict package with explicit closure of this bridge assumption.

proved_core_blockers.description: Stress lanes are strong and all-zero, but still scoped to structure-first synthetic families rather than a full physically anchored cross-sector realism closure.
exit_criteria: Define and execute a preregistered realism expansion lane for weak-to-strong leakage that is accepted by skeptic review.
Either preserve all-zero strong residual or formally falsify and revise the bridge.

proved_core_blockers.description: Claim is explicitly `closure_scope = structure_first`; proved_core is policy-blocked until scope migration criteria are satisfied.
exit_criteria: Create and approve a full-value closure scope update for THETA-001.
Re-run full gate stack and independent skeptic review under the upgraded scope.

recommendation.rationale: All supported-bridge gates and diagnostics are green, but proved_core blockers remain explicit and unresolved under current structure-first scope.

deliverables: New RFC addendum defining theorem statement and admissible assumptions.
Lean target list for final identification chain beyond conditional bridge form.
required_next_steps.description: Draft exact theorem plan to discharge continuum identification assumption.

deliverables: New stress-lane artifact with deterministic replay hash.
Updated skeptic review comment on realism boundary closure.
required_next_steps.description: Add realism-focused weak leakage suite with preregistered acceptance criteria.

deliverables: Promotion memo with explicit go/no-go checklist for proved_core attempt.
